FlaggedIssue.description: Clinical implant issue reported by clinical staff.

/archived_orders/{id}.description: Archived clinical orders and replenishment requisitions.

/flagged_issues/{id}.description: System issues, physical damage reports, or out-of-stock items flagged.

/custom_locations/{setId}.description: Synchronized physical shelving locations by set ID.

/onsite_sets/{setId}.description: On-site presence statuses for sets, indicating local vault availability.

/set_verifications/{setId}.description: Verification status records for individual implants or sets.
